testScenario: Verify app resilience when individual permissions / capabilities are revoked. Each step revokes a permission, checks the degraded behavior, and confirms graceful fallback.

steps.name: 撤销通知监听权限 (Revoke notification-listener access)
steps.description: Disable notification access for the app via system settings.
steps.method: adb shell settings put secure enabled_notification_listeners "" (or revoke via UI)
steps.expectedBehavior: Listener service unbinds; no further capture.

steps.name: 检查监听服务停止 (Verify listener stopped)
steps.description: Confirm the listener component is no longer enabled.

steps.name: 撤销生物识别 (Revoke biometric / remove fingerprint)
steps.description: Remove enrolled biometrics or disable biometric auth.
steps.expectedBehavior: App falls back to lock-screen/PIN auth or locks sensitive views.

steps.name: 检查应用锁定 (Verify app locks down)
steps.description: Confirm sensitive data is hidden when biometric unavailable.
steps.method: Launch app, attempt to view parcel codes.
steps.expectedBehavior: Sensitive views hidden; biometric prompt unavailable gracefully.

steps.name: 撤销存储权限 (Revoke storage / media access)
steps.description: Revoke READ/WRITE external storage or scoped storage access.

steps.name: 检查无法导出 (Verify export disabled)
steps.description: Confirm export-to-file feature degrades without storage permission.
steps.expectedBehavior: Export button disabled or shows permission rationale.

steps.name: 撤销前台服务 (Revoke / block foreground service)
steps.description: Stop or disallow the foreground service used for reminders.
steps.method: adb shell am stopservice; or disable via battery settings.
steps.expectedBehavior: Reminders degrade; no crash; user informed.

steps.name: 检查后台限制 (Verify background limits handled)
steps.description: Confirm the app handles background execution limits without errors.

steps.name: 撤销开机自启 (Revoke boot-completed behavior)
steps.description: Prevent auto-start on boot (OEM auto-start management).
steps.method: Disable auto-start in OEM settings; reboot device.
steps.expectedBehavior: App does not auto-capture until user launches it manually.

steps.name: 检查不自启 (Verify no silent auto-start)
steps.description: Confirm no background capture occurs before manual launch.
steps.method: After reboot, send courier notification before launching app.
steps.expectedBehavior: No capture until app is launched by user.

steps.name: 撤销精确闹钟 (Revoke SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM)
steps.expectedBehavior: Reminders fall back to inexact alarms; timing less precise but no failure.

steps.name: 检查提醒降级 (Verify reminder degradation)
steps.description: Confirm reminders still fire (within inexact window) without crash.
steps.method: Schedule a reminder, wait, observe notification.
steps.expectedBehavior: Reminder fires in degraded (inexact) mode; user notified.

steps.name: 重新授权恢复 (Re-grant permissions)
steps.method: Re-enable notification access, biometrics, storage, exact alarm.
steps.expectedBehavior: App restores full functionality without reinstall.

steps.name: 功能恢复正常 (Verify full function restored)
steps.description: Confirm all features work again after re-grant.
steps.method: Trigger capture, reminder, biometric unlock, export.
steps.expectedBehavior: All features operational; no residual error state.

_meta.description: Permission-revoke resilience verification with 14 steps covering notification access, biometric, storage, foreground service, boot-start, and exact-alarm revocation and recovery.
